content:
But there’s one thing we do need gov to do.

2 min read
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

I’m a centrist.
I like government. And Democracy. I like libraries. And welfare. Free schools & medical care. The arts.
But government interventions never lead to much increase in productivity or of the standard of living of needy or middle class citizens.
A few % here or there.
But technology has previously doubled the standard of living 3 or 4 TIMES in the last 250 years (steam, cars, electricity & computing).
And I don’t like this idea of denigrating people who took risks and created things we found useful . . And then became millionaires.
The ones really good at making stuff we love become the billionaires.
The fact they are billionaires means they are experts at helping us. And employing us too.
Taxing billionaires a little more is probably a good idea. But not too much because it will minimize their creation of NEW ventures & technologies.
And those new technologies are of FAR, FAR more importance to us than more once-off or siphoned-off extra tax dollars.
